triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value percentage is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that LTV must be calculated as (Total Advance) / (Vehicle Trade Price). This value is critical for assessing compliance with the maximum LTV thresholds for the applicant's credit tier.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income (DTI) Ratio Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income ratio is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that DTI must be calculated as (Total Monthly Credit Commitments + Proposed Monthly Instalment) / Verified Net Monthly Income. This value is critical for assessing affordability and compliance with the maximum DTI thresholds for the applicant's credit tier.

content.reasoning: The proposal was reviewed against the underwriting policy manual. The applicant's credit score places them in Tier A, which allows for a maximum DTI of 45% and an LTV of 110%. However, the proposal lacks calculated values for both DTI and LTV, which are critical for compliance verification. These omissions prevent a full assessment of the proposal's adherence to policy.
